start_time.description: Job start time (UTC). Stored as Arrow timestamp(us, tz=UTC); the column type is validated structurally, not as a JSON string.

end_time.description: Job end time (UTC). Stored as Arrow timestamp(us, tz=UTC); the column type is validated structurally, not as a JSON string.

submit_time.description: Job submit time (UTC). Optional. Stored as Arrow timestamp(us, tz=UTC); validated structurally.
